• The Ring can tempt you even if you don't control a creature.
• The Ring gains its abilities in order from top to bottom. Once it gains an ability, it has that ability for the rest of the game.
• Each time the Ring tempts you, you must choose a creature if you control one.
• Each player can have only one emblem named The Ring and only one Ring-bearer at a time.","colors":[],"artist":"Viko Menezes","artist_id":"92dfef2a-d0fa-42fd-bdd6-bc4c9286cb56","illustration_id":"9c8bc3e5-8c90-4995-810c-3ac59d1db6ce","image_uris":{"small":"https://img.klrmngr.com/large/back/7/2/7215460e-8c06-47d0-94e5-d1832d0218af.jpg","normal":"https://img.klrmngr.com/large/back/7/2/7215460e-8c06-47d0-94e5-d1832d0218af.jpg","large":"https://img.klrmngr.com/large/back/7/2/7215460e-8c06-47d0-94e5-d1832d0218af.jpg","png":"https://img.klrmngr.com/png/back/7/2/7215460e-8c06-47d0-94e5-d1832d0218af.png","art_crop":"https://img.klrmngr.com/art_crop/back/7/2/7215460e-8c06-47d0-94e5-d1832d0218af.jpg","border_crop":"https://img.klrmngr.com/border_crop/back/7/2/7215460e-8c06-47d0-94e5-d1832d0218af.jpg"}}],"reserved":false,"foil":true,"nonfoil":true,"finishes":["nonfoil","foil"],"oversized":false,"promo":false,"reprint":false,"variation":false,"set_id":"f6267b1d-21e9-4a7f-a5b3-7c2af4fc958b","set":"tltr","set_name":"Tales of Middle-earth Tokens","set_type":"token","set_uri":"https://api.scryfall.com/sets/f6267b1d-21e9-4a7f-a5b3-7c2af4fc958b","set_search_uri":"https://api.scryfall.com/cards/search?order=set&q=e%3Atltr&unique=prints","scryfall_set_uri":"https://scryfall.com/sets/tltr?utm_source=api","rulings_uri":"https://api.scryfall.com/cards/7215460e-8c06-47d0-94e5-d1832d0218af/rulings","prints_search_uri":"https://api.scryfall.com/cards/search?order=released&q=oracleid%3A98737456-ac2a-420d-aa0e-778ba3a22cec&unique=prints","collector_number":"H13","digital":false,"rarity":"common","artist":"Viko Menezes","border_color":"black","frame":"2015","security_stamp":"triangle","full_art":false,"textless":false,"booster":false,"story_spotlight":false}]}
